statement: After editing .github/ customization files or .vscode/ configuration files, use read/problems to check for YAML frontmatter syntax errors, invalid JSON, incorrect tool names, and missing required fields. VS Code validates these files natively via built-in schema validation, so diagnostics catch configuration errors the same way they catch code errors.
publicSummary: Check read/problems after editing .github/ and .vscode/ config files — VS Code lints them natively.
cautionNotes: Not all .github/ files have full schema validation. YAML frontmatter linting depends on installed extensions.
